brand.name: OPLURIX
brand.mission_note: Digital product revenue supports the longer ERIS mission.
brand.language_rule: Public storefront copy must work in English and French.

sales_channels.checkout: PayPal payment links or buy buttons
sales_channels.delivery_mode: Manual email delivery after payment confirmation during the first sales cycle
non_goals: Do not imply instant automated digital delivery if manual delivery is still in use.
Do not require Gumroad for the first launch if Netlify plus PayPal is sufficient.
Do not mix Techni-Drones employer promotion with product checkout copy.

products.headline: Turn field notes, research, and conservation work into clear LinkedIn content.
products.launch_pricing_note: Founder-launch price while delivery is still manual and the first buyer feedback loop is being built.
products.core_promise: Help conservation professionals turn real field and research work into credible thought-leadership content without sounding fake, promotional, or scientifically careless.
what_is_inside: capture templates for field notes and project observations
LinkedIn post prompts for conservation communication
content frameworks grounded in science communication
editing checklist for clarity and authority
ethics and safety guide for sensitive conservation information
truthful_outcomes: more consistent visibility for real expertise

products.headline: Go from raw field data to cleaner tables, figures, and Results-ready outputs faster.
products.pricing_strategy_note: Use a low entry tier, a clearly preferred middle tier, and a higher anchor tier with real added support.

public_tiers.headline: The core R and AI workflow for biodiversity data.
public_tiers.truthful_positioning: Low-friction entry point for buyers who mainly need the core scripts and prompts.

public_tiers.headline: The full workflow from field notes to cleaner tables, figures, and Results-ready drafts.
public_tiers.truthful_positioning: Main offer tier. This is the version the storefront should steer most buyers toward.

public_tiers.headline: The planned full EcoR workflow with walkthroughs, community access, and one month of email support.
public_tiers.truthful_positioning: Public anchor tier only. Do not take payment until the walkthrough assets and support workflow are actually ready.

audience: conservation researchers working with biodiversity count data
products.core_promise: Help buyers move from messy biodiversity field data to usable R workflows, figures, and interpretation-ready outputs without wasting hours on scattered tutorials.
what_is_inside: annotated R scripts
Claude prompt library for debugging and interpretation
field data templates
ggplot2 figure templates
workflow guide from field notes to Results section
truthful_outcomes: better starting point for figures and written results
products.future_pricing_strategy_note: Future price increases should be tied to added proof, new assets, or stronger support rather than arbitrary repositioning.
products.first_sale_delivery_rule: Verify payment in PayPal first, then send the Google Drive delivery link manually by email and log the fulfillment event.

products.headline: Turn training documents, SOPs, and field protocols into validated quizzes that prove competency.
products.launch_pricing_note: Planned launch price. Do not activate checkout until delivery assets and payment flow are verified.
products.core_promise: Help conservation trainers convert SOPs, field manuals, and workshop materials into validated quizzes that verify understanding and field protocol competency rather than just recall.
what_is_inside: 5-step SOP-to-quiz conversion system
8 question type library with conservation scenarios
AI prompt pack for quiz generation
quality and validation checklist
scenario-based example set from real field training contexts
truthful_outcomes: faster quiz creation from existing documents
more consistent competency assessment across training cohorts

products.headline: Turn conservation data, field findings, and project results into donor-ready, funder-ready pitch decks.
products.launch_pricing_note: Planned launch price. Do not activate checkout until delivery assets and payment flow are verified.
products.core_promise: Help conservation professionals convert biodiversity data, field evidence, and project outcomes into structured pitch decks that communicate clearly to donors, funders, and institutional partners.
what_is_inside: 4-step deck build system
12-slide conservation pitch blueprint template
audience adaptation guide for donors, funders, and partners
AI prompt pack for deck content generation
before-and-after examples from real conservation contexts
truthful_outcomes: faster pitch deck production from existing data
clearer conservation narrative for non-specialist audiences
more fundable presentation of field and research results

always_include: manual-delivery truth if checkout automation is not live yet
never_claim: fully automated delivery when that is not yet true
